description: Composite app-shell sidebar (shadcn pattern). On desktop it's a collapsible <div> structure with data-state / data-collapsible attributes; on mobile it renders inside a Sheet (Radix Dialog) so focus trapping and Escape-to- close work automatically. Includes a global Ctrl/Cmd+B keyboard shortcut to toggle the sidebar, plus a SidebarRail affordance for drag-resize.

keyboard.action: Toggles the sidebar open / closed (global listener registered by SidebarProvider).
Moves focus through SidebarMenuButton / SidebarMenuSubButton items in DOM order.
Activates the focused menu button (which is usually a link or a button).
On mobile (Sheet mode), closes the sidebar and returns focus to the trigger.

focus.notes: On desktop the sidebar is part of the page flow; focus is not trapped. On mobile it opens in a Sheet, so Radix Dialog's focus trap applies. SidebarRail is tabIndex={-1} by design; it's a pointer-only drag affordance that also works as a click target.

announcements: SidebarTrigger includes an sr-only "Toggle Sidebar" label so the icon button is named.
On mobile, the Sheet wrapper exposes a sr-only SheetTitle "Sidebar" and SheetDescription "Displays the mobile sidebar."
Each SidebarMenuButton announces its text and active state; data-active=true sets the accent styling but consumers should also add aria-current="page" for route-based active items.
screenReader.notes: When collapsed on desktop, SidebarMenuButtons can be paired with a Tooltip that appears on hover / focus. The Tooltip is hidden in the expanded state via the hidden prop on TooltipContent.

contrast.text: Menu text uses sidebar-foreground; muted variants use sidebar-foreground/70 for group labels. All meet WCAG AA
contrast.ui: Focus ring uses ring-sidebar-ring at 2px; active state uses bg-sidebar-accent. Both meet AA non-text contrast

motion.reducedMotion: Width / transform transitions use duration-200 ease-linear. Gate with motion-reduce:transition-none if strict compliance matters.

consumerResponsibilities: Set aria-current="page" on the active SidebarMenuButton / SidebarMenuSubButton; the isActive prop only drives styling, not semantics.
Provide tooltip text on SidebarMenuButton when using collapsible="icon" mode so icon-only buttons have an accessible name even when the label is hidden.
For the mobile Sheet variant, users expect Escape to close; don't override onEscapeKeyDown unintentionally.
The Ctrl/Cmd+B shortcut is global. Document it in your app's keyboard shortcuts help surface so users can discover it.
